DP.274.0000:
The mission is proceeding without
a hitch. The boss should be pleased.\f
Everything is for everyone, and
for the good of Team Galactic!\f
DP.274.0001:
I recognize your face!\f
You’re the child who raided the Team
Galactic building in Eterna!\f
Humph! Jupiter should be ashamed of
herself, being beaten by a child.\f
But anything and anyone that opposes
Team Galactic must be crushed!\f
Even the very thought of opposition
will not be tolerated!\f
DP.274.0002:
Gah! Even I, a Commander, only
managed to buy us time?\f
But that’s fine.\f
A child like you will never be able to
stem the flow of time!\f
Team Galactic will get the three
legendary Pokémon of the lakes!\f
With their power, we will create an
entirely new universe!\f
By now, Mars should have captured
the Pokémon of Lake Verity...\f
DP.274.0004:
AZELF disappeared deep into
the cavern...
